description: Runtime config for the QBO sync pipeline. Holds the cutoff date and ToDo assignee. Single doctype.

fields.label: Staging Enabled
fields.description: Master switch for the on_submit hook. Off by default — turn on once you've confirmed the cutoff date is right.

fields.label: Earliest Posting Date
fields.description: PIs with posting_date before this date are skipped entirely (never enter the queue). All submitted PIs on/after this date are eligible — no Local/Import filter.

fields.label: Assignee User
fields.description: Who gets the ToDo sidebar items when queue rows or unapproved maps need attention.

fields.label: Runner Push Poll Interval (min)
fields.description: Informational. The external runner reads this to size its push-poll cron cadence.

name: QBO Sync Settings
